raw.message:
🏆 New Customers: £30 in Free Bets when you bet £10!
Available to use this UEFA Champions League Matchweek.
18+ | GambleAware.Org

hook.summary: High-energy stadium zoom showcasing a 'Bet £10 Get £30' sign-up offer.
hook.visual_action: A fast zoom into a digital stadium with glowing green text overlays.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Get thirty pounds when you bet ten pounds this UEFA Champions League match week.

scene_flow: Fast-paced zoom into a neon-lit stadium displaying the sign-up offer.
Cinematic shot of the UEFA Champions League trophy.
Live-action presenter explaining the offer in a high-tech studio.
End card with brand logos and a clear call to action to download the app.
audience_proxy: Adult sports fans in the UK looking for betting incentives during major football tournaments.
